selection.selection_note: Judged only owned repair batch 38 notice-board symbols against standard_source_table metadata, semantic_brief, S-57/S-52 notmrk instructions, the repaired owned SVGs on branch codex/FORGE-14-batch38-judge at 33b653e, and available provider-reference metadata. The provider reference directory was absent in this checkout; the local OpenCPN render paths are catalog witnesses only and were not present as PNG files on disk.

verdicts.observed: Candidate is a square green notice board with black outline and white entry-permitted vertical-bar/entry cue.
verdicts.expected: NMKINF01 must preserve the entry-permitted notice-board class: green field, white load-bearing entry pattern, black outline, and no substitution with a generic diamond or unrelated mark.
verdicts.judge_comments: Semantic gate passes. The candidate preserves the unique green/white entry-permitted information mark and the repaired rectangular board family. The stylized right-facing entry cue is acceptable for pass-pending-human because the board color and entry-permitted pattern are recognizable. No final approval implied.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual/semantic rerun; candidate may move only to judge_pass_pending_final_approval and must not be final-approved by this artifact.
